title: Construct Binary Tree from Inorder and Postorder Traversal
description: Given two integer arrays inorder and postorder where inorder is the inorder traversal of a binary tree and postorder is the postorder traversal of the same tree, construct and return the binary tree in level-order traversal format.
input_format: The first line contains inorder traversal separated by space. The second line contains postorder traversal separated by space.
output_format: The level-order traversal of the constructed tree, separated by space. Use 'null' for empty nodes.
constraints: inorder and postorder consist of unique values.
